note: Hand-curated arrival and recovery campgrounds for the Mount Rainier vertical slice. Policies transcribed from nps.gov/mora/planyourvisit/campgrounds.htm and corrected per the 2026-07-20 post-alignment audit: White River is first-come first-served, and Ohanapecosh is closed for the 2026 season for construction. Live campground inventory is NOT fetched; a reservable campground's availability must be reported unknown, and first-come stays carry no guarantee. Drive minutes are road-time approximations keyed by graph entrance node id. Closures use inclusive ISO date ranges; a campground closed for a requested night must never be offered for it.

campgrounds.name: Cougar Rock Campground
campgrounds.source: nps.gov Mount Rainier campgrounds page; recreation.gov campground 232466
campgrounds.season: late May to late September, check current dates
campgrounds.notes: 2 miles up the road from Longmire. Reservations through recreation.gov in summer.

campgrounds.name: White River Campground
campgrounds.source: nps.gov Mount Rainier campgrounds page (first-come, first-served per current NPS information; corrected 2026-07-20)
campgrounds.season: late June to late September, check current dates
campgrounds.notes: Adjacent to the White River trailhead; about 45 minutes of road to Sunrise. First-come, first-served: no reservations, arrive early, especially on summer weekends.

campgrounds.name: Ohanapecosh Campground
campgrounds.source: nps.gov Mount Rainier campgrounds page; closure recorded 2026-07-20 from current NPS information
campgrounds.season: closed for 2026; normally late May to late September

closures.reason: Ohanapecosh Campground is closed for the 2026 season for construction (per nps.gov); check the park site for reopening

campgrounds.notes: Old-growth river campground on the southeast side, closest drive to Box Canyon. Closed for the 2026 season.

campgrounds.name: Mowich Lake Campground
campgrounds.season: July to early October, gravel road, check current status
campgrounds.notes: Primitive walk-in sites at the lake, no reservations, arrive early. Serves the northwest corner; no graph entrance is keyed to it yet.
